ideation: This sequence mimics the action of carefully picking a garlic bulb.  The animation starts with both arms relaxed at the sides, then the right arm reaches down, mimicking the picking motion.  The left arm remains mostly stationary to provide balance. Finally, the right arm brings the garlic up to the face, simulating the inspection of the bulb before use. This action is often associated with cooking or preparing food, which the garlic emoji is related to.  The sequence is designed to be smooth and deliberate, reflecting the careful handling of a delicate item.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready to harvest
right arm reaches down to grasp the bulb
bringing the garlic up for a closer look
